# Demo: Sift Payment Protection

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Real-time Payment Fraud Prevention for the World’s Most Trusted Brands

Prevent credit card fraud and CNP abuse, reduce chargebacks, and stop unauthorized transactions with Sift Payment Protection. Learn how our cutting-edge technology and user-friendly Console enable businesses to stop fraud before it happens.

### See Payment Protection in Action

Watch Demo

Watch Demo

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
